case_title: BRIAN KASSER ET AL VS. ZIMMER INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING APPLICATION FOR COMPLEX DESIGNATION; SINGLY ASSIGNING CASE; AND SETTING CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED 7/21/16, AN INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR SEPTEMBER 2, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 305. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE PREVIOUSLY SET FOR NOV-09-2016 AT 10:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 610 IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. CASE HAS BEEN DEEMED COMPLEX AND SINGLY ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 305/JUDGE WISS FOR ALL PURPOSES. (305/MEW)
